drivers.name: PJLink Class 1 Projector
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls any PJLink Class 1 compatible projector. Supports 100+ models from Epson, NEC, Panasonic, Sony, Christie, Hitachi, BenQ, Optoma, Canon, and Vivitek.

drivers.name: Samsung MDC Display
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Samsung commercial displays via the MDC (Multiple Display Control) binary protocol. Covers Smart Signage, The Wall, and LED series.

drivers.name: Wake-on-LAN
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Send Wake-on-LAN magic packets to wake any Ethernet device on the network.

drivers.name: Extron SIS Protocol
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Extron products via the SIS (Simple Instruction Set) protocol. Covers 200+ products: crosspoint matrix switchers, presentation switchers, scalers, distribution amplifiers, and DSPs.

drivers.name: LG SICP Display
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls LG commercial displays via the SICP (Serial Interface Communication Protocol) over TCP. Covers webOS signage displays, LED, and OLED commercial series.

drivers.name: Kramer Protocol 3000
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Kramer products via Protocol 3000. Covers matrix switchers, scalers, distribution amplifiers, and Via wireless presentation systems.

drivers.name: Biamp Tesira TTP
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Biamp Tesira and TesiraFORTE DSPs via the TTP (Tesira Text Protocol). Supports level, mute, preset recall, and logic state control.

drivers.name: Shure Networked Devices
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Shure networked audio devices via TCP command strings. Covers MXA910/920/710 ceiling microphone arrays, ANI interfaces, P300 IntelliMix, and SCM820 mixers.

drivers.name: QSC Q-SYS QRC
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls QSC Q-SYS Core processors via the QRC (Q-SYS Remote Control) protocol. Supports named controls, snapshots, and component access across the entire Q-SYS ecosystem.

drivers.name: Crestron DM NVX
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls Crestron DM NVX AV-over-IP encoders and decoders via the REST API. Supports device status, video/audio source selection, stream routing, and AV I/O monitoring.

drivers.name: vMix
drivers.author: OpenAVC
drivers.description: Controls vMix video production software via the TCP API. Supports transitions, input switching, audio mixing, overlays, recording, streaming, titles, replay, and PTZ.
